display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Correlation Middleware
- Generate/Extract Correlation ID
- Set correlation_id_ctx
- Add to response headers

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Logging Middleware
- Log incoming requests
- Track response time
- Use correlation ID

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
JWT Auth Interceptor
- Validate Bearer token
- Check Authorization header
- Decode JWT payload

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
User Routes
POST /auth/token
GET /users
POST /users
GET /users/{id}
PUT /users
DELETE /users/{id}

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
User Service
- create_user()
- get_users()
- get_user()
- update_user()
- delete_user()

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
User Repository
- save()
- find_all()
- find_by_id()
- delete()

span.p:
Exception Handlers

- 400 Missing header

User Model

- name: str
- email: str
